description: This file defines a Zustand store for managing authentication state in a frontend application. It includes functions to hydrate state from local storage, set a user session, and clear the session.

methods.name: hydrateFromStorage
methods.description: Loads authentication token and user data from local storage if available, updating the store state.

methods.name: setSession
methods.description: Sets the authentication token and user data in the store and saves it to local storage.

methods.name: clearSession
methods.description: Clears authentication data from the store and local storage, effectively logging out the user.

ctags.name: parsed
ctags.pattern: /^      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as { token: string; user: User };$/
